author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol performs Syntehsize First Strand...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs Syntehsize First Strand cDNA for the Illumina COVIDSeq protocol. Links: * [1. Anneal RNA](./0cded6) * [2. Synthesize First Strand cDNA](./0cded6-synthesize) * [3. Amplify cDNA](./0cded6-amplify) * [4. Tagment PCR Amplicons](./0cded6-tagment) * [5. Post Tagmentation Clean Up](./0cded6-cleanup) * [6. Amplify Tagmented Amplicons](./0cded6-amplify2)

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.
